publishedAbstract: - `rook-ceph-mon` stuck in pending status ~~~ $ oc get pod-n openshift-storage |grep mon rook-ceph-mon-a-6b8d9fcd77-bnzr9 2/2 Running 0 20d rook-ceph-mon-e-5847c679-z9q8s 2/2 Running 0 20d rook-ceph-mon-f-65676855d7-wpq6q 0/2 Pending 0 39m ~~~- Red Hat OpenShift Container Storage health is warning ~~~ $ ceph status health: HEALTH_WARN 1/3 mons down, quorum a,e ~~~- A lot of persistent volumes have status `Failed` ~~~ $oc get pv|grep Failed pvc-1f6ffaf4-8311-43ca-9e4d-d186dfc5e0fb 10Gi RWO Delete Failed openshift-storage/rook-ceph-mon-p ocs-backend01 8d pvc-34f4f76a-aeb6-453f-b5d1-160c4c884282 10Gi RWO Delete Failed openshift-storage/rook-ceph-mon-ab ocs-backend01 7d pvc-3e8d9064-3cd6-4a12-a07f-2dbd1d04042e 10Gi RWO Delete Failed openshift-storage/rook-ceph-mon-bt ocs-backend01 5d pvc-83b81cea-27ed-4cf6-b9aa-6ef1356e0170 10Gi RWO Delete Failed openshift-storage/rook-ceph-mon-bn ocs-backend01 6d pvc-e6265880-a79f-45c8-b652-8e57ca5a026f 10Gi RWO Delete Failed openshift-storage/rook-ceph-mon-bq ocs-backend01 5d ~~~
publishedTitle: rook-ceph-mon pod stuck on pending state
